description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa with a compact footprint, designed for urban outdoor or indoor environments. The sofa features a right-angle configuration, with one segment longer than the other, providing ample seating space for multiple people. The seat and back cushions are visibly thick and uniform, suggesting a comfortable and supportive sitting experience. The armrests are present on both ends of the L-shape, matching the height of the backrest and maintaining a clean, blocky profile. The sofa appears to be upholstered in a smooth, solid-colored fabric, with no visible patterns or decorative stitching. The legs are not visible, indicating either a low-profile or hidden leg design, contributing to a minimalist aesthetic.
description: A modern, L-shaped sectional sofa with thick, uniform cushions and blocky armrests, upholstered in a solid, smooth fabric. The design is compact and minimalist, suitable for urban settings.
description_view_0: From this view, the L-shaped configuration and the uniform thickness of the seat and back cushions are clearly visible.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the sofa's armrest and the height of the backrest relative to the seat.
description_view_2: The rear angle shows the continuous backrest and the right-angle junction of the sectional layout.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the shorter segment of the L-shape and the blocky profile of the armrest.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three seat cushions and three back cushions, all attached and uniform in size, arranged in an L-shaped sectional layout.
attribute_armrest_style: Blocky, straight armrests present at both ends, matching the height of the backrest, with no visible decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are not visible, suggesting a hidden or recessed base design, likely integrated into the sofa's frame for a low-profile look.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, straight backrest of medium height, with attached cushions and no visible tufting or segmentation.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid, smooth fabric with no visible pattern, texture, or decorative stitching.
